HomeDestinationsLepchajagat
West Bengal

Lepchajagat

The Lepcha Heritage Village

Dawn breaking over heritage cottages, amber light painting stories of Lepcha culture on wooden walls.

4.5
(88 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
19°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Lepchajagat is a quaint village that preserves the rich Lepcha culture and offers some of the best sunrise views over the Himalayas.

History

A village inhabited by the indigenous Lepcha community, offering authentic cultural experiences.

Altitude

1,950 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Darjeeling, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Culture

Lepcha Cultural Center

Museum showcasing Lepcha traditions and artifacts.

Viewpoint

Sunrise Point

Famous for golden sunrise over Kanchenjunga.

KuboVista

Ancient Lepcha Grove

Sacred forest preserved by the Lepcha community.

Why visit: Spiritual and cultural significance

Viewpoints

sunrise

Sunrise Point Lepchajagat

Best sunrise view in the region.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Heritage Kitchen

4.5

Lepcha & Nepali • ₹250-450

Traditional Lepcha cuisine.

Cafes

Sunrise Cafe

4.4

Specialty: Herbal Brews

Start your day with traditional herbal drinks.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Lepcha Handloom

Traditional Lepcha textiles and crafts.

Lepcha shawlsBamboo basketsTraditional jewelry

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Cultural Walk

Easy

Guided walk through Lepcha villages.

3 hrs
₹600

Suggested Itineraries

Activities

  • • Village walk
  • • Sunset
Lunch, Dinner
Taxi from NJP

₹2,500

Activities

Breakfast
Taxi
N/A
₹1,000

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

Frequently Asked Questions

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
